rulings.Case Title: ELDER MARTINEZ et al VS. GLORIA C. ARGUETA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; Proof Of Service

PLAINTIFFs ELDER MARTINEZ and CONTARINO BARRERA's Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents. Grant, subject to defendant providing declaration from doctor re unavailability due to eye condition with specificity. = (501/REQ)
